name: --fix mode in code_pipeline corrupted Python files,...

failure_pattern.symptom: --fix mode in code_pipeline corrupted Python files, causing SyntaxError in 10+ files
failure_pattern.root_cause: Both remove_unused_imports and sort_imports don't properly handle multi-line imports. They read node.lineno but not node.end_lineno, causing partial line replacements that corrupt the import block.
failure_pattern.detection: code_refactor.py:remove_unused_imports and sort_imports functions - they replace lines[start_line-1:end_line] but don't properly calculate end_line for multi-line imports

prevention.before_action: Before enabling auto-refactoring tools, test on codebases with: 1) multi-line imports, 2) parenthesized imports, 3) imports with comments. Add specific unit tests for these cases.
prevention.avoid: Both remove_unused_imports and sort_imports don't properly handle multi-line imports. They read node.lineno but not node.end_lineno, causing partial line replacements that corrupt the import block.
prevention.alternative: Disabled fix operations by setting SAFE_FIX_OPERATIONS = []. Moved remove_unused_imports and sort_imports to UNSAFE_FIX_OPERATIONS with bug notes. Later fixed properly with AST-based DeadCodeFinder in commit dadcc6f.

recovery.if_detected: Disabled fix operations by setting SAFE_FIX_OPERATIONS = []. Moved remove_unused_imports and sort_imports to UNSAFE_FIX_OPERATIONS with bug notes. Later fixed properly with AST-based DeadCodeFinder in commit dadcc6f.

examples.scenario: --fix mode in code_pipeline corrupted Python files, causing SyntaxError in 10+ files
examples.outcome: Both remove_unused_imports and sort_imports don't properly handle multi-line imports. They read node.lineno but not node.end_lineno, causing partial line replacements that corrupt the import block.
examples.lesson: Before enabling auto-refactoring tools, test on codebases with: 1) multi-line imports, 2) parenthesized imports, 3) imports with comments. Add specific unit tests for these cases.

repro_steps:
Project has files with multi-line imports like: from X import (
    A,
    B,
)
